allow: Bash(mkdir -p /f/npm-global /f/npm-cache && npm config set prefix "F:\\\\npm-global" && npm config set cache "F:\\\\npm-cache" && echo "=== 更新后配置 ===" && npm config list 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('git'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('twit'\)\); console.log\(names\);")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /globe|github|twitter|linkedin/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\('Brand matches:', names\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => /^\(?!Lucide\)[A-Z][a-z]+$/.test\(k\)\); const wanted = ['Globe','Link','AtSign','Hash','MessageCircle','Code','Codepen','Container','Network','Share','User','Users','Star','Heart','Send','Rss','FileText','BookOpen']; wanted.forEach\(w => console.log\(w, ':', w in l\)\);")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL available'\)")
